MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MARK PARSONS, SR., believed to be erroneously sued as Ted Parsons, Sr. AND SWC FINANCIAL CORPORATION'S Motion For Change Of Venue (TO SUPERIOR COURT OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF ORANGE).
APPEARANCES: Thomas M. Swihart, Esq. of Law Offices of Thomas M. Swihart 510/843-2750 for pltf & opposing party; John J. Gulino, Esq. of Lane & Phillips 714/282-2432 for defts & moving parties (appearing via CourtCall).
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - The motion is granted. Plaintiff's claims are transitory and defendants are entitled to have such claims tried where defendants reside. Defendant to submit proposed form of order. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
